message.content: @startuml skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center skinparam participantStyle rectangle skinparam lifelineStrategy solid actor "Service" as Service1 at 0 participant "Access token guard\n---\nSession module" as Guard at 25 rectangle "Auth microservice\n===\n| Session | Auth |\n|--|" { participant "" as SM inside } box "#9ACD32" participant "\t\tSession module" as SessMod at 75 end box box "#9ACD32" participant "\t\tAuth module" as AMod at 86 end box == Request Handling == activate Service1 Guard ->+ Guard : get headers deactivate Guard alt [Authentication header is undefined] return **401** else Authentication exists activate Guard note right of Guard: check authentication \nheader existence deactivate Guard alt Access Token Validated? yes - Validate access_token else No- Invalid or Expired end endif if Client ID Extracted From JWT Payload Then Return It Else Throw Error Message Saying That There Is An Issue With Your Account Please Try Again Later Or Contact Support Team For Assistance Thank You Very Much Indeed Sir/Madam Have A Nice Day Ahead Of Us All Together Now Let's Get Back To Work Shall We Not So Fast My Friend First Things Come Before Others Always Remember This Rule When Dealing With Customers Who Want Something Done Right Away Without Any Delay At Costly Prices Either Way They Will Pay More Money Than Necessary Just Because Their Time Was Wasted By Someone Else Instead Doing What Needs Being Said Here Today Okay Good Luck Everyone Out There Reading These Words On Screen As Well Maybe Even
